creator: robin@isometry.net
text:
Update to latest release, dovecot-1.0.12:
 - Fixes a common insecure mail_extra_groups setting usage (see http://www.dovecot.org/list/dovecot-news/2008-March/000060.html). Note: this will require a manual change to the active configuration file.
 - Resolve ports/117894.

For full release notes see http://www.dovecot.org/list/dovecot-news/2008-March/000061.html and http://www.dovecot.org/list/dovecot-news/2008-March/000062.html
